notes: Previously-flagged 'Norway – England' duplicate row (lørdag 11. juli, 23:00) is gone — the fixture now appears exactly once at all three widths.

No horizontal scroll or edge clipping at 375px; single quiet column holds at all widths, including the longest headline/event rows (e.g. 'Diamond League Monaco (Herculis EBS)', 'Tour de France 2026' subtitle).

Match/fixture names read in full and unambiguous, including Norwegian-relevant ones: France – Morocco, Spain – Belgium, Norway – England, Argentina – Switzerland — no truncation hiding a side of a fixture.
Norwegian-channel contract holds: only NRK, NRK 1, TV 2, TV 2 Play, Viaplay, Max +1, Direktesport +1 appear as 'where to watch' — no foreign broadcaster (ESPN/FOX/Sky) seen at any width.
Round labels (Kvartfinale, Semifinale, Damefinale, Herrefinale) show correctly next to knockout/final fixtures at all widths.
National flag emoji (France, Morocco, Spain, Belgium, Norway, England, Argentina, Switzerland) render as real flags, not broken-image boxes.

Must-see accent (left border + tinted background) is applied selectively — Sjakk-NM, Genesis Scottish Open, ISCO Championship, Diamond League Monaco, Norway–England, Swiss Open Gstaad, VM-semifinaler, The Open — not to every row, consistent with 'sparingly'.
Header, 'Dine neste' tracked list, day-group headings, 'Hva vi følger'/'Rediger' links, and footer (Oppdatert / Abonner i kalender / AI-budsjett) are intact and aligned at every width.

Could not assess clearly: the tennis icon (Casper Ruud, Wimbledon, Swiss Open Gstaad rows) reads ambiguously — looks closer to a magnifying-glass glyph than a clear tennis pictograph at all widths; not clipped or broken-image, just visually unclear which sport it signals at a glance.
No event showed the honest empty '–' channel placeholder in this data snapshot, so that path could not be exercised.
